title: fix: mark ElevenLabs audio models alpha
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Alpha Audio
gist.blurb: We've updated our audio registry to properly tag ElevenLabs speech and music models as alpha. Just keeping the hive's metadata tidy!
gist.summary: Updated the shared audio registry to mark ElevenLabs speech and music models with an alpha status flag.
gist.impact: Ensures internal metadata accurately reflects the current availability and experimental status of ElevenLabs audio models.
gist.visual_concept: The bee organizing audio tapes or records with 'alpha' stickers in a cozy music/audio lab setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, placing an 'ALPHA' sticker on a retro cassette tape. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head holds a clipboard nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
